description: Accounts in Judaeo-Arabic. The hand may be known. Likely a join with ENA 3740.2–3. Mentions people such as Yaʿqub b. Naḥūm. Mentions goods such as pearls and coral and carnelian. Also mentions "the large ledger" (al-daftar al-kabīr) in Arabic script. (Information in part from Goitein’s index card)
description_he: חשבונות ביהודית-ערבית; מוזכרים פנינים, אלמוגים ואקיק; 'הספר הגדול' מוזכר בכתב ערבי
